name: splunk-dashboards
description: Professional toolkit for Splunk Dashboard Studio (v2). End-to-end pipeline (scope, data, design, build, validate, deploy, review, polish) plus a granular reference: one skill per visualization type (ds-viz-*), per interactivity concept (ds-tokens, ds-inputs, ds-drilldowns, ds-tabs, ds-visibility, ds-defaults), a viz-picker router (ds-pick-viz), and the design-principles + JSON-schema references.
